yes.question: Was the force used to commit an offence or to cause injury, fear or annoyance?

no.question: Was the force used to deter a public servant from discharging his duty?

yes.name: Assault or criminal force to deter public servant from discharge of his duty

no.question: Was the force used to dishonour a person?

yes.name: Assault or criminal force with intent to dishonour person, otherwise than on grave provocation

no.question: Was the force used to commit theft or wrongfully confine a person?

yes.question: Was the property being carried by the person?

yes.name: Assault or criminal force in attempt to commit theft of property carried by a person

no.name: Assault or criminal force in attempt to wrongfully confine a person

sections.name: Punishment for assault or criminal force otherwise than on grave provocation.
Assault or criminal force to deter public servant from discharge of his duty.
Assault or criminal force with intent to dishonour person, otherwise than on grave provocation.
Assault or criminal force in attempt to commit theft of property carried by a person.
Assault or criminal force in attempt to wrongfully confine a person.
Assault or criminal force on grave provocation.
